name: Raspberry Cream Brownie Wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a small bowl, combine filling ingredients. Beat for 1 minute at medium speed and set aside.
3. Melt butter and chocolate in a medium saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Add sugar and 3 eggs to the melted mixture; beat well. Stir in flour, baking powder, salt, and Chambord.
5. Spread half of the chocolate mixture in the bottom of the greased pan.
6. Spread filling over the chocolate layer.
7. Spread remaining chocolate mixture over the filling.
8. Bake for 37-42 minutes or until the center is set. Let cool on a rack for 5 minutes, then run a knife around the edge to loosen. Cool completely before removing from the pan.
9. Melt glaze ingredients over a double boiler and spread it on top of the brownie. Allow to cool.
